sql_array: CREATE TABLE replication_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), status BOOLEAN, data_date DATE);
INSERT INTO replication_test (id, name, status, data_date) VALUES (1, 'test1', TRUE, '2020-01-01');
INSERT INTO replication_test (id, name, status, data_date) VALUES (2, 'test2', NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO replication_test (id, name, status, data_date) VALUES (3, 'test3', FALSE, '2021-01-01');
DELETE FROM replication_test WHERE id = 1 AND NOT (name IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (srv VARCHAR(100), publication VARCHAR(100), active BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO subscriptions (srv, publication, active) VALUES ('demo-srv', 'demo-publication', TRUE);
INSERT INTO subscriptions (srv, publication, active) VALUES ('demo-srv', 'archive-publication', NULL);
SELECT * FROM replication_test WHERE status IS NOT NULL AND NOT (data_date > '2020-12-31');
SELECT srv, publication FROM subscriptions WHERE active = TRUE AND NOT (srv IS NULL);
CREATE VIEW active_subscriptions AS SELECT srv, publication FROM subscriptions WHERE active IS TRUE;
SELECT * FROM active_subscriptions WHERE NOT (publication = 'demo-publication') ORDER BY srv;
SELECT id FROM replication_test WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM replication_test WHERE status IS NULL);
SELECT name FROM replication_test WHERE name NOT IN (SELECT name FROM replication_test WHERE id = 3) HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replication_test WHERE status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY data_date HAVING COUNT(*) < 10;
SELECT id, name FROM replication_test WHERE data_date = (SELECT MIN(data_date) FROM replication_test) AND NOT (status = FALSE);
SELECT * FROM subscriptions WHERE NOT (active IS TRUE) AND NOT (srv LIKE 'demo%') OR (publication IS NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replication_test WHERE status IS NULL GROUP BY data_date HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (temp_id INT, temp_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_data (temp_id, temp_value) VALUES (1, 'NULL'), (2, 'test');
SELECT temp_id FROM temp_data WHERE NOT (temp_value IS NULL) AND temp_value = (SELECT temp_value FROM temp_data WHERE temp_id = 2);
SELECT * FROM replication_test WHERE REPL_UNSUBSCRIBE('demo-srv', 'demo-publication', NULL) NOT IN (SELECT name FROM subscriptions WHERE active IS NULL);
